name: yt-dlp
author: Misty
overview: yt-dlp brings YouTube downloading into Misty so users can grab videos, playlists, and audio conversions without leaving the app. It relies on the system yt-dlp and FFmpeg tools instead of shipping separate binaries.
capabilities: Download single YouTube videos or playlists
Convert downloads into MP3, M4A, MP4, or WEBM
Save media into sensible Music, Movies, or Downloads folders
where_it_appears: Files tabs when launched from Files
permissions: Write access to local download folders
Shell access to invoke yt-dlp and FFmpeg
getting_started: Install yt-dlp and FFmpeg on the machine running Misty.
Open the plugin from the Plugins view or the global plugin launcher.
Paste a YouTube URL, choose MP3 or MP4, and start the download.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Added a native Misty yt-dlp panel with audio and video presets.
